title: The Sunny Becomes the Escape Route
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on Big Mom, Unknown person #9, Nami, Luffy, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: The Straw Hats fight to reach the Sunny while Big Mom’s rage turns the sea and islands against them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't mind if I do! A yum- my little cloud!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: What is he doing?! damn it, zeus!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami, no time to dilly-dally! They're right behind us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You bastards just don't know when to give up. Do ya?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Run as fast as you can! Don't look back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like Mama used ZEUS to finish them off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Looks like your friends are dead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you put your lives on the line and somehow manage to win this ship back from us,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: None of the people that once rode it with you are coming back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're content to leave on that little submarine of yours,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll let just the two of you go free.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get outta here! That's our sunny you're standing on!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 36 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
